summary: ClashSolverOffsetServiceUnderAllBeamsInViewCommand — PDF "OFFSET_SERVICE_UNDER_ALL_BEAMS_IN_VIEW". Bulk drop of services below the lowest beam soffit in the active view.
usecase: Coordination pre-pass to remove routine beam clashes.
notfor: Per-element targeted offsets — use OFFSET_SERVICE_AROUND_DUCT or MOVE_OBJECT_DOWN.
precondition: Active view with StructuralFraming elements visible.
postcondition: Zero or more ElementTransformUtils.MoveElement calls, each inside its own Transaction.
logictree:
1) Enumerate StructuralFraming in active view; WireError if none.
2) beam_soffit_z_ft = min over beams of bb.Min.Z (lowest underside in view).
3) Gather candidate services from Resolver_ElementIds (Bot) OR FilteredElementCollector scoped to active view for Pipes/Ducts/CableTrays (Human).
4) For each service: compute drop_ft = max(0, (service bb.Max.Z - beam_soffit_z_ft) + envelope_ft).
5) If drop_ft > 1e-6, delegate TryDirectionalMoveOnService.ProbeAndMove(doc, service, -Z, drop_ft, threshold_ft, centreFallback=false). Otherwise emit {already_below_beams}.
6) Aggregate and emit summary.

preprompts: Dropping services below all in-view beams…
thinkingsteps: Dropping each candidate service via DirectionalMoveService…
